title: Blood Stock Alert System
description: The system shall raise an alert to the blood bank manager when the stock of any blood type falls below 5 units.
rationale: To ensure timely replenishment of blood supplies before a shortage occurs, reducing the risk of patient treatment delays or shortages.
business_value: Improves patient care by preventing potential shortages and ensuring timely availability of necessary blood types for treatments.

source.description: As a blood bank manager, I need the system to raise an alert when stock of any blood type drops below 5 units so that I can replenish supplies before a shortage occurs.

acceptance_criteria: The system raises an alert when the stock of any blood type falls below 5 units.
Alerts can be sent via email, SMS, or in-app notification.
preconditions: The blood bank has inventory levels for each blood type.
postconditions: The system sends an alert to the blood bank manager.
functional_constraints: Alerts are triggered only when stock falls below 5 units.
All blood types must be tracked.
edge_cases: What happens if the inventory data is delayed or incorrect?
How does the system handle simultaneous stock drops for different blood types?

interfaces.name: Inventory API
interfaces.description: The system will call this API to get the current inventory levels of each blood type.

interfaces.name: Email/SMS Gateway
interfaces.description: The system will use this external service to send alerts via email, SMS or in-app notifications.

test_cases.description: Test alert functionality with inventory at threshold level.
test_cases.expected_result: An alert is raised for each blood type that has exactly 5 units of stock.

test_cases.description: Test alert functionality with inventory below threshold level.
test_cases.expected_result: An alert is raised for each blood type that has less than 5 units of stock.

test_cases.description: Test alert functionality with inventory above threshold level.
test_cases.expected_result: No alerts are raised as all blood types have more than 5 units of stock.
